description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with a variety of trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat green roof, extensive floor-to-ceiling windows, and a large patio area with outdoor seating. The main entrance is sheltered by an overhanging roof, and the property includes a driveway leading to a garage. The backyard contains a swimming pool and a spacious lawn, while the front and sides are bordered by decorative hedges and flowering trees. The exterior is finished with a combination of wood paneling and concrete, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall layout is open and emphasizes a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, wood and concrete finishes, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, overhanging roof, large windows, and landscaped front yard with a mix of trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard pool, patio seating area, and open lawn bordered by trees and hedges.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the driveway, garage, and a clear view of the flat green roof and side garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the extensive row of trees, the side lawn, and the rear section of the bungalow.
